Petition To Approve Payment Of Compensation To Respondent And Attorneys For Respondent And For Costs
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Continued To Feb-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Off Calendar

Joint Petition For Court Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Fanady, via Zoom, for and with Nicole Patterson, Petitioner; Konstantine Demiris, via Zoom, for Scott Phipps, Objector.

The court offers its position regarding the petition for approval of settlement and confirms with counsel that they do not intend to request an evidentiary hearing regarding attorney's fees. Both Ms. Fanady and Mr. Demiris confirm the preceding and advise that elements regarding attorney's fees are included in the settlement agreement.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Joint Petition For Court Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Continued To Aug-17-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Apr-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Fanady appeared by zoom for and with Nicole Patterson by zoom.
Konstantine Demiris appeared by zoom for and with Scott Phipps by zoom.

Mr. Demiris stated that they have met and conferred, that they will not be having a trial, and that they had a second day of mediation and although it didn't resolve the matter, communications are moving forward. Mr. Demiris also stated that the parties have essentially agreed that his client would be released of all liability in regards to his acts as power of attorney and trustee, that the remaining issues of concern are of fees of his client and of the other side, that they will be petitioning to the court to determine the reasonableness of fees for both sides, that either side could object and that they will submit on the papers so that they don't have to have a trial on those issues. Ms. Fanady stated that the parties also agreed that Mr. Phipps will resign, that each side will petition for fees, that the parties will submit on the papers, that they will abide by the court's decisions and that fees will be paid according to the court's orders. The Petition for Relief to Remove Attorney in Fact Under Power of Attorney is continued to April 11, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for approval of settlement agreement is also set for April 11, 2022. The court informed the parties that it is very pleased that they worked this out.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Continued To Feb-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Fanady, via ZOOM, for Nicole Patterson, Trustee; Konstantine Demiris and Michael Schreiber, via ZOOM, for Scott Phipps, via ZOOM, Objector.

The court asks for an update regarding this matter. Mr. Demiris reports that discovery has been set by both sides and have met and conferred, unsuccessfully, but is open to additional mediation. The court asks counsel if this matter is ready for trial. Mr. Demiris reports that depositions have not taken place but that the case may be ready for trial sometime in May of 2022. Ms. Fanady confirms the status of depositions and reports that she is almost done with written discovery and that her client is open to additional mediation and suggests the removal of Mr. Phipps as attorney in fact under power of attorney. Mr. Demiris offers oral testimony in support of his client. The court and counsel continue to discuss mediation. Mr. Demiris reiterates his clients' willingness to mediate and suggests that the trust pay for a private mediation as court ordered pro bono mediation has some limitations that don't come with a private mediator. The court advises Mr. Demiris that his request is informal but that the court was going to order the parties to pro bono mediation regardless. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Jan-24-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the status of mediation by Feb-07-2022. The Parties are to return on Feb-14-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Petition to Remove, etc., is continued to Feb-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204. The Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar. The parties are advised to monitor the court's register of actions to obtain a copy of the Minute Order Referring the Case to Pro Bono Mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Off Calendar

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Fanady, via ZOOM, for Nicole Patterson, via ZOOM, Petitioner.

The court asks counsel if she has heard from counsel for Objector. Counsel reports that she has not. Counsel advises that she had hoped to confirm trial dates today. The court notes that it is unusual for Mr. Demiris not to appear at a scheduled hearing and does not want to set trial dates without Mr. Demiris' appearance to avoid having to reschedule due to scheduling conflicts.

After brief discussion, the Petition for Relief, etc., and Case Management Hearing are continued to Nov-08-2021 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Continued To Oct-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kimberly Fanady appeared by zoom for and with Nicole Patterson (petitioner) by zoom.
Konstantine Demiris appeared by zoom for and with Scott Phipps (power of attorney).

Ms. Fanady stated that they mediated in mid-June with Bette Epstein, that the parties did not reach settlement and that they have started to conduct discovery. Ms. Fanady also stated that the dispute seems to be about fees and that if Mr. Phipps resigns, they can all submit their fees and they can resolve this. Mr. Demiris stated that there is no reason to continue to pursue his client resigning, that this petition should be dismissed, that if there is any issue with his client's fees, his client will file a petition for approval of the court for the accountings and all fees, and that the reverse mortgage is what brought this petition. The court noted that it is unusual for a professional fiduciary to stick around after they have been asked to leave. Mr. Demiris stated that there is an issue of other allegations, that if his client resigns, he has been threatened with a law suit and asked that the matter be set for trial. Ms. Fanady stated that the family no longer wants to work with Mr. Phipps and that she is not ready for trial today. The Petition for Relief to Remove Attorney in Fact Under Power of Attorney is continued to October 27, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed counsel that it will issue a case management order which will require the parties to file a joint case management statement which will be due on/by October 13, 2021. The court also encourages the parties to work this out.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Continued To Jun-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Fanady, Esq., counsel for and with Nicole Patterson, Petitioner (appearing separately by video conference); Konstantine Demiris, Esq., counsel for and with Scott Phipps, Objector (appearing separately by video conference).

Ms. Fanady reports little success in resolving the dispute before the Court. Mr. Demiris contends that the matter is suitable for mediation with which Ms. Fanady disagrees, contending that the issues that Mr. Demiris raises during settlement negotiations are not relevant to the matter before the Court. Mr. Demiris objects to specific discussions at settlement.

After further discussions, Ms. Fanady consents to pro bono mediation and the Court refers the same to pro bono mediation. The Court continues the present matter and sets hearing on the status of the mediation for June 28, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION Petition For Relief To Remove Attorney In Fact Under Power Of Attorney

Appearances; Kimberly Fanady appeared by zoom for and with Nicole Patterson (Petitioner) by zoom.
Konstantine Demiris appeared by zoom for and with Scott Phipps (Objector) by zoom.

The Court stated that it did not see any objections. Mr. Demiris stated that his Client's objections were submitted by file and serve express this morning. The Petition to Remove Attorney in Fact under Power of Attorney is continued to April 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it wants the parties to work informally on resolving this.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
